title: General Affidavit
description: A sworn written statement of facts, voluntarily made by an affiant under oath, typically used as evidence in legal proceedings.
disclaimer: This is a generic template provided for informational purposes only and is not a substitute for advice from a licensed attorney. Affidavits typically must be signed before a notary public.
body:
AFFIDAVIT

STATE OF {{governing_state}}
COUNTY OF {{county}}

I, {{affiant_name}}, residing at {{affiant_address}}, being first duly sworn, depose and state as follows:

{{statement_of_facts}}

I declare under penalty of perjury under the laws of {{governing_state}} that the foregoing is true and correct to the best of my knowledge.

Executed on {{affidavit_date}}.

_______________________________
{{affiant_name}} (Affiant)

Subscribed and sworn to before me this ____ day of __________, 20____.

_______________________________
Notary Public
